stem: The length of each edge of a cube-shaped box is 17 centimeters. Each side of the box is in the shape of a square. The box does not have a top. What is the exterior surface area, in square centimeters, of this box without a top?
rationale: The correct answer is 1,445. The exterior surface area of a figure is the sum of the areas of all its faces. Since the box does not have a top and each face is a square, the box consists of 5 congruent square faces. With edge length 17 cm, each square face has area 172 = 289 square centimeters. Therefore the total exterior surface area is 5(289) = 1,445 square centimeters.
